hero.title: Help in Gdynia, when life is difficult
hero.subtitle: Find free, verified and up-to-date psychological, legal and social support offers in Gdynia – for you or someone close to you.
hero.alwaysFreeDesc: All offers in the browser are free of charge.
hero.verifiedUpToDateDesc: Each offer is checked by the home institution.

search.title: Quick search
search.subtitle: Search by problem, type of help or institution name.
search.whatHelp: What do you need help with?

info.title: What is Gdynia Wspiera?
info.p1: This browser collects social help offers for people experiencing difficulties in everyday life – related to violence, addiction, finances, health, family and other challenges.
info.p2: All offers are free of charge, up to date and checked by the home institution responsible for the service.
info.p3: You will find information about the type of support, who it is for, where it is provided and how to contact the center – including therapists, lawyers, social workers and many more.

layout.footerDesc: Gdynia Wspiera – browser of free, up-to-date and verified social help offers.
layout.footerEmergency: For emergencies, always contact local emergency numbers first.

about.description: Gdynia Wspiera is your trusted gateway to free, verified social support in Gdynia. We understand that life can be challenging, and access to the right help shouldn't be complicated or costly.
about.missionDesc: We collect, verify, and continuously update information about free social support offers available to Gdynia residents. Whether you're struggling with mental health, financial difficulties, domestic violence, addiction, or any other life challenge, we're here to connect you with the right resources.
about.trustDesc: Our offers come from public institutions, NGOs, and carefully vetted trusted partners. Every single offer is thoroughly checked for availability, accessibility, scope of support, and accurate contact information before it appears here.
about.gettingStartedDesc: Head to our Offers page and explore help for your specific needs. Use filters to narrow by support type, location, or online assistance. Every offer is completely free.
about.wantToHelpDesc: If you represent an organization that offers social support in Gdynia, we'd love to hear from you. Contact the City of Gdynia's social support institutions through official channels to add or update your offer.
about.emergencyNotice: In case of emergency or immediate danger, always contact local emergency services (112) first. Gdynia Wspiera is a support finder, not an emergency service.

helpOthers.p1: If you want to support people in difficult life situations, Gdynia Wspiera helps you find safe and verified ways to do it – through volunteering, material support or cooperation as a professional.
helpOthers.p2: You can contact institutions directly using the details in their offers to ask about current needs (for example volunteer help, donations in kind) or about forms of professional cooperation.
helpOthers.p3: Thank you for being ready to help – your involvement strengthens the support system for residents of Gdynia.
helpOthers.subtitle: Browse volunteering, internship and collaboration offers. Find a way to help others.

volunteering.searchPlaceholder: Type a name, place or keyword…
volunteering.noResultsHint: Try changing the filters or searching for a different keyword.

howToUse.intro: This page invites you to use the browser in a calm and safe way – whether you are looking for help for yourself, for someone close to you, or as a professional supporting others.
howToUse.step1: Choose the area of difficulty (for example violence, addiction, financial problems, mental health).
howToUse.step2: Use filters such as type of center, district or online help to narrow down the results.
howToUse.step3: Open the details of the offer to see who it is for, what it provides and how to contact the institution.
howToUse.closing: Remember: all offers shown here are free of charge and verified by the home institution. If you are in an emergency or life-threatening situation, always contact emergency services first.

offers.subtitle: Browse free, verified social help offers in Gdynia. Refine the results using the filters.
offers.noResults: No offers match the selected filters.
offers.noResultsHint: Try removing some filters or using a different keyword.
offers.notFoundDesc: Share your problem and an institution worker will contact you to suggest the best help available.

offerDetail.mapPreview: A detailed map preview will be available in the main offers view.

submitProblem.title: Share Your Problem
submitProblem.subtitle: Describe your situation so we can better help you. All information is kept confidential.
submitProblem.problemDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe in detail what problem you are facing and what kind of help you would need...
submitProblem.additionalDetailsPlaceholder: Any other important information that might help us (optional)...
submitProblem.validationError: Please fill in all fields marked with an asterisk (*).
submitProblem.successMessage: Thank you! Your submission has been sent. We will contact you soon.
submitProblem.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
submitProblem.privacyNote: Your personal data is protected and will only be used to provide you with assistance.
